formVerificationNotice.title: Form verification required
formVerificationNotice.message: VA Form PIPE-TEST does not exist in official VA form inventory. Please verify the correct form designation before proceeding with development.

validation.ssn: Enter a valid 9-digit Social Security number
validation.generic: Please check your entry and try again

submission.blocked: Form submission is not available. Form verification required.
submission.serverError: We're sorry. Something went wrong on our end. Please try again.
submission.networkError: We're having trouble connecting to VA.gov. Check your internet connection and try again.
submission.timeout: Your request timed out. Please try again.
submission.maintenance: VA.gov is currently under maintenance. Please try again later.

saveInProgress.saveError: We couldn't save your form. Please try again.
saveInProgress.loadError: We couldn't load your saved form. Please try again.
saveInProgress.expired: Your saved form has expired. Please start a new application.
saveInProgress.notFound: We couldn't find your saved form. Please start a new application.

eligibility.notEligible: Based on your answers, you may not be eligible for this benefit. Please call 800-827-1000 to speak with a representative.
eligibility.incomplete: Please answer all eligibility questions to continue.

fileUpload.sizeTooLarge: Your file is too large. Please choose a file that's smaller than 25MB.
fileUpload.wrongType: Please choose a PDF, JPEG, or PNG file.
fileUpload.virusDetected: We detected a problem with your file. Please try uploading a different file.
fileUpload.uploadFailed: Your file didn't upload. Please try again.

authentication.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again to continue.
authentication.signInRequired: Please sign in to save your progress and submit your form.
authentication.verificationRequired: Please verify your identity to continue.

prefill.loadError: We couldn't load your information from your VA.gov profile. You can continue filling out the form manually.
prefill.updateProfile: Some of your information may be out of date. You can update it in your VA.gov profile.

review.missingData: Please go back and complete all required sections before submitting.
review.certificationRequired: Please certify that your information is correct by checking the box below.
